title: Ezure's Eden Mod
body:
This Mod Adds A New Dimension Called The "Eden" Which is a new dimension that adds a New Ore Type, Armor, Tools And Weapons, And Blocks And Is Aimed at Giving Extra Progression In The Vanilla Base Game.

Please Note: This Mod Is In Beta And May Have Bugs Or Issues! This Version is available to those that want to test out the mod and have a feel for it and to report any feedback or suggestions they have for the mod.


Important: To Enter The Eden Dimension You Will Need To Mine For "Eden Block"s and craft a "Eden Orb" To Access The Portal, The Portal Is The Same As Making The Nether Portal!





I Hope you enjoy what i have to offer you all so far and more features and fixes will be implemented very soon! :)
